nodes.name: Day 1
nodes.description: Day with: St. Lawrence Market, CN Tower, Queen Street Warehouse

nodes.name: St. Lawrence Market
nodes.description: Start your day at this iconic market, where you can grab a breakfast of famed peameal bacon sandwiches from Carousel Bakery.

nodes.name: CN Tower
nodes.description: Visit one of the world's tallest towers and enjoy panoramic city views from the observation deck.

nodes.name: Queen Street Warehouse
nodes.description: Budget-friendly comfort food in a lively setting with a diverse menu.

nodes.name: Art Gallery of Ontario
nodes.description: Explore Canadian, European, and contemporary art in a Frank Gehry-designed building.

nodes.name: Buca Yorkville
nodes.description: Upscale Italian dining featuring traditional dishes with a modern twist.

nodes.name: The Rex Hotel Jazz & Blues Bar
nodes.description: Live jazz performances in a cozy, iconic Toronto venue.

nodes.name: Day 2
nodes.description: Day with: Pow Wow Cafe, Royal Ontario Museum, Annona Restaurant

nodes.name: Pow Wow Cafe
nodes.description: Indigenous-inspired brunch featuring bannock tacos in Kensington Market.

nodes.name: Royal Ontario Museum
nodes.description: World-renowned museum showcasing art, culture, and natural history.

nodes.name: Annona Restaurant
nodes.description: Sophisticated international cuisine in a bright, modern setting.

nodes.name: Casa Loma
nodes.description: Historic castle featuring secret passages, gardens, and panoramic views.

nodes.name: DaiLo
nodes.description: Modern Asian-Canadian fusion cuisine with creative flavors.

nodes.name: Rivoli
nodes.description: Live music venue showcasing jazz, indie, and emerging artists.

nodes.name: Day 3
nodes.description: Day with: Beauty Barbecue & Smokehouse, Toronto Islands, Amsterdam BrewHouse

nodes.name: Beauty Barbecue & Smokehouse
nodes.description: Hearty breakfast featuring smoked meats and classic comfort food.

nodes.name: Toronto Islands
nodes.description: Ferry ride to scenic islands with beaches, bike trails, and gardens.

nodes.name: Amsterdam BrewHouse
nodes.description: Lakeside pub offering local craft beers and hearty meals.

nodes.name: Distillery District
nodes.description: Historic pedestrian village with cobblestone streets and artisan shops.

nodes.name: Cluny Bistro
nodes.description: French-inspired bistro serving classic and modern dishes.

nodes.name: Jazz Bistro
nodes.description: Renowned jazz club with intimate setting and excellent acoustics.
